name: theme-preset-tool
title: Theme Preset Tool
description: Interactive theme builder with 12 OKLCH presets, random palette generator, per-token color editor, radius control, and CSS/JSON export. Standalone — no Redux required.

files.content:
/**
 * Theme Presets
 * Curated color themes with light + dark variants in OKLCH format
 */

import type { ThemePreset, ThemePresetId } from "./types";

/**
 * MIDNIGHT - Deep indigo/violet with high contrast
 * Primary: indigo/violet hue around 265°
 */

  id: "midnight",
  label: "Midnight",
  description: "Deep indigo with violet accents",
  accentLight: "oklch(0.42 0.18 265)",
  accentDark: "oklch(0.70 0.15 265)",
  light: {
